evals.prompt: How do I write integration tests for Spring Boot with a real database?
evals.expected_output: Use Testcontainers to spin up a real PostgreSQL/MySQL container. Avoid H2/embedded DB (behavior differences). Use @SpringBootTest for full context or @DataJpaTest for slice.

evals.prompt: How do I write slice tests for my Spring MVC controllers?
evals.expected_output: Use @WebMvcTest to load only the web layer. Mock service dependencies with @MockBean. Use MockMvc for HTTP assertions. Use AssertJ assertThat over JUnit assertions.

evals.prompt: How do I test Spring Boot services that call external HTTP APIs?
evals.expected_output: Use WireMock to stub external HTTP calls. Never make real network calls in tests. Isolate external dependencies with @MockBean for unit tests.

assertions.description: Warns against real network calls in tests

should_not_trigger: How do I write NestJS unit tests?
How do I write Go unit tests?
How do I configure Spring Boot security?
